channel.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast
channel.description: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:summary: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:author: Helix

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - March 24, 2026
item.description: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
item.content:encoded: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - March 24, 2026
item.itunes:summary: Covers 7 stories: OpenAI's record $110B round at $730B valuation, Anthropic's $30B Series G at $380B valuation, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super launch at GTC, Tesla's $20B AI chip factory, ElevenLabs' $500M at $11B valuation, White House vs. state AI regulation, xAI restructuring amid competition.
